title: Create Touch-Ups
description: Reworks some of Create's textures and models
body:
A Resource pack centered around Create. Tweaks some textures and models to make them simpler and more in line with vanilla. Vanilla copper has also been given some touch-ups.

 

Changes include:

    Simplified models for cogwheels
    Updated wrench textures
    A new model for goggles
    Tweaks to the fluid pipes texture, making them look more metallic
    Slight tweaks to the shading of vanilla copper blocks and items
